item.title: Novo Nordisk / Sickle Cell Disease Therapy
item.description:
• Summary: Novo Nordisk achieved a Phase 3 win for its sickle cell disease therapy, acquired from Forma Therapeutics, positioning it for approval in an $11 billion market. However, the data reportedly lag behind expectations, increasing competitive pressure.
  • MoAs: N/A
  • Sources: BioSpace, Fierce Biotech, Endpoints News

item.title: Genentech Hemlibra Marketing
item.description:
• Summary: Genentech is shifting its marketing focus for Hemlibra (emicizumab) towards patient stories as competition in the hemophilia treatment landscape approaches.
  • MoAs: Hemlibra (emicizumab) is a bispecific monoclonal antibody that binds to activated factor IX and factor X, mimicking the function of factor VIII to prevent bleeding in hemophilia A patients.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma
